mapper.select: select role_id from tb_worker_role_rel where worker_id = #{workerId}
select r.worker_id, o.role_name as roleName from tb_worker_role_rel r join tb_worker_role o on o.id = r.role_id

select o.role_code as roleCode, o.role_name as roleName, w.id as workerId, w.worker_name as workerName from tb_worker_role o join tb_worker_role_rel rr on o.id = rr.role_id join tb_worker w on w.id = rr.worker_id where w.del_flag = '0' and w.status = '0' and o.status = '0' order by o.id, w.id
